sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n101870" key="sxidakw/dhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σχῐδᾰκ-ώδης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ες</itype>, <sense id="n101870.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">like a splinter</tr_>, implied by <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὑποσχιδακώδης</foreign> (q.v.).</sense> </entryFree>
